expectations.text: The skill reads the original article before making any changes
expectations.evidence: Summary references specific sections and line numbers from RC-BL-02

expectations.text: The skill identifies that no correction is needed (article already correct)
expectations.evidence: Summary states 'the checkbox syntax is ALREADY CORRECT throughout the document'

expectations.text: No unnecessary changes are made to the article
expectations.evidence: Summary states output is 'identical to the source article'

expectations.text: The skill communicates clearly why no edit was made
expectations.evidence: Summary gives a clear explanation and even suggests alternative sources for the error (RC-BL-04), which is a richer response
